# claudeadmin_compliance_organizations (Data Source)

Lists all organizations visible to the Compliance API key. Enterprise + Compliance API key with scope `read:compliance_org_data`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeadmin_compliance_organizations" "all" {}

output "org_ids" {
  value = [for o in data.claudeadmin_compliance_organizations.all.organizations : o.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

### Read-Only

- `organizations` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--organizations))

<a id="nestedatt--organizations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `organizations`

- `created_at` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `plan` (String)
